title: Typesense Collection
description: Schema for a Typesense collection definition including field schemas, embedding configuration, and indexing options.

fields.description: Array of field definitions that describe the schema of documents in this collection.

default_sorting_field.description: Name of the field to sort results by when no sort_by parameter is specified in a search query.

token_separators.description: Characters to use as token separators in addition to whitespace during indexing and search.

symbols_to_index.description: Characters that should be indexed as part of tokens rather than being stripped.

enable_nested_fields.description: Whether to enable indexing of nested object fields within documents.

synonym_sets.description: Names of synonym sets to attach to this collection for expanding search queries with synonyms.

voice_query_model.description: Configuration for voice query processing model.

model_name.description: Name of the voice query model.

metadata.description: Arbitrary metadata to store alongside the collection definition.

num_documents.description: Number of documents currently indexed in the collection. Read-only.

created_at.description: Unix timestamp when the collection was created. Read-only.

Field.description: Definition of a field within a collection schema.

name.description: Name of the field. Use .* suffix for dynamic fields matching a pattern.

optional.description: Whether this field is optional in documents. Defaults to false.

facet.description: Whether this field can be used for faceted search. Defaults to false.

index.description: Whether this field should be indexed for searching. Defaults to true.

sort.description: Whether this field can be used for sorting results.

infix.description: Whether infix (substring) search is enabled for this field.

locale.description: Locale code for language-specific tokenization, e.g., ja for Japanese.

reference.description: Reference to a field in another collection for JOINs, in the format collection_name.field_name.

num_dim.description: Number of dimensions for vector embedding fields. Required when type is float[] and the field is used for vector search.

store.description: Whether to store the field value for retrieval. Set to false to index-only.

range_index.description: Whether to build a range index for efficient numeric range filtering.

stem.description: Whether stemming is enabled for this field.

stem_dictionary.description: Name of a custom stemming dictionary to use for this field.

drop.description: Set to true during a collection update to drop this field from the schema.

vec_dist.description: Distance metric for vector nearest-neighbor search.

EmbedConfig.description: Configuration for automatically generating vector embeddings from one or more source fields.

from.description: Field names whose values are concatenated and passed to the embedding model.

model_name.description: Name of the embedding model. Built-in models include ts/all-MiniLM-L12-v2. External models from OpenAI, Google, and others are also supported.

api_key.description: API key for external embedding service authentication.

url.description: URL of the external embedding service endpoint.

access_token.description: Access token for OAuth-based embedding services.

client_id.description: Client ID for OAuth-based embedding services.

client_secret.description: Client secret for OAuth-based embedding services.

project_id.description: Project ID for cloud-based embedding services.
